intro: Dayia havardii, also known as Havard's dayflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Compositae. This plant is valued for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Dayia havardii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
